channel.title: Anti-Piracy on The Security Gazette
channel.description: Recent content in Anti-Piracy on The Security Gazette

item.title: CCTV for Cinemas and Theatres — Entertainment Venue Security UK 2026
item.description: CCTV installation for cinemas and theatres: screen protection against piracy, box office security, auditorium monitoring, audience safeguarding, and licensing compliance.
